content.en:
"After studying the ultimate dimensional killing move for so long, I finally have a direction now. "

"Next, let's focus on creating, step by step. "

Subsequently.

Ye Tian focused on spending his strength on creation, not just research.

He discarded all his past perceptions, and only immersed himself in the divine dimension, based on the strength of the physical body, to create this ultimate dimensional killing move.

He knew very well that if he wanted to create such an ultimate dimensional killing move, he would definitely not be able to do it in a short period of time, and it would take a long time.

And Ye Tian has such time.

10,000 gods!

100,000 Gods!

A million gods!

During this period, many Ultimate powerhouses came to visit him or asked him to have something to do, inviting him to explore certain places, but he refused them one by one.

Until this day after the year of the three hundred and twenty-one thousand gods.

Ye Tian was experimenting with a new and perfect killing move.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian's physical strength was concentrated at one point, and it burst out in an instant, shattering a piece of Divine Dimensional Void in front of him with a punch.

"It's done, the killing move Tianwei has reached the level of the ultimate dimension killing move!" 27

Ye Tian smiled.

The reason why he was sure to have reached the level of the Ultimate Dimension Killing Move was because he had just touched the origin of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth.

This is the power of the ultimate dimensional killing move, once it is cast, it can touch the origin, and even attract more divine power to accelerate the completion of the ultimate process.

It can be said that every ultimate powerhouse who has comprehended the ultimate dimension killing move will become the ultimate master.

In the days that followed, Ye Tian was still practicing silently, but his main task was to improve the process of ultimateness, and it was impossible to create a second ultimate-dimensional killing move.

In order to create the killing move Tianwei, he has almost exhausted his foundation, where can he still create a second ultimate dimensional killing move, if he can't jump out of the box of Tianwei killing move, what to create is still Tianwei, which is useless.

An ultimate lord like the Lord of the Heavenly Vine is estimated to be the ultimate dimensional killing move of the Heavenly Vine's Fury.

Before you know it, another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian's Ultimate Polarization Process had already reached half of it, and such a terrifying improvement speed was unimaginable to other Ultimate Powers.

He originally wanted to continue cultivating like this, and he was not in a hurry to return to the Void Heaven Palace.

He wanted to get more benefits from the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, so that it was worth this time, after all, the second reward would need to be charged.

But on this day, the unexpected came.

......

"An Ultimate Lord has returned to the Divine Dimension!"

Ye Tian frowned, this is not a good thing.

He was worried that he would be discovered by the Ultimate Lord now, and if his strength was average, it would be fine, but if it was the Ultimate Lord of the Extreme Horror, he would be in trouble.

"It's better not to look at each other. "

Thereupon.

Ye Tian announced the death pass, but in fact, he left the Divine Dimension Domain and went to the Tianwei Pavilion on the other side of the Xuantian Domain.

Fortunately, the Ultimate Lord did not look for outsiders everywhere in the Divine Dimension, but only dealt with some things and left again.

This also made Ye Tian breathe a sigh of relief.

In a flash, hundreds of thousands of gods have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian's ultimate process was about to be completed, and once it was completely completed, he would break through to the ultimate master.

Although he doesn't have the inheritance of the Ultimate Lord, and he doesn't know exactly how to impact the Ultimate Lord, he has already comprehended the Ultimate Dimension killing move, so the bottleneck does not exist, and he can easily complete the breakthrough.

Soon after, he had achieved 99.9% of the totality, leaving only the last point, and he sensed the existence of a bottleneck.

A normal ultimate powerhouse will fall into this step and will not be able to break through no matter what.

But Ye Tian didn't need to find other ways, he directly used the Tianwei killing move to integrate the power of his whole body, break the last shackles, and absorb the origin of the Shenwei Heaven and Earth to impact the bottleneck.

Rumble!!!!!

As soon as Tianwei's killing move came out, the last bottleneck was broken.

With Ye Tian's breakthrough, he truly understood the true meaning of the Dao of the Divine Dimension, and he had many insights at every moment.

His mind seemed to have expanded to the entire Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth, and this was another good opportunity to create the Ultimate Dimension Killing Move.

So, he didn't waste any time trying to create a second Ultimate Dimensional Killer move.

With his Divine Dimension Talent Qualifications, he is also really expected to create a second Ultimate Dimension Killing Move.

Just when the breakthrough process was over and his mind returned to his physical body, he finally created a second killing move.

This killer move is based on the mind, and wherever the mind goes, the body is there.

Killer Move-Tianji

This killing move focuses on speed, and it is the speed of the ultimate dimensional killing move, which also makes Ye Tian's strength skyrocket.

......

Divine Dimension Domain, Twelve Heavenly Sects.

Yao Ri Heavenly Sect.

At this moment, a group of Ultimate Powerhouses looked at the Tianwei Pavilion one after another.

"Guys, who has broken through to the Ultimate Lord Realm?"

"I don't know, under the management of our Twelve Heavenly Sect, there are still Ultimate Strength Masters who have suddenly broken through to the Ultimate Lord, this is too unexpected for us!"

"What should I do, the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth suddenly appeared an Ultimate Lord, you must contact the Ultimate Lords, otherwise there will be a big problem. "

It wasn't that they were afraid that this Ultimate Lord would attack them, but that they were worried that if their Twelve Heavenly Sect didn't have the Ultimate Powerhouse in charge, the right to speak would no longer be theirs.

Immediately, they contacted the Ultimate Powerhouse of the Yao Sun Heavenly Sect, and the other Twelve Heavenly Sects would also contact the Ultimate Powerhouse of their own sect.

Tianwei Pavilion.

Ye Tian was saying goodbye to the high-level officials of Tianwei Pavilion.

"From today onwards, the Pavilion Master 073 of Tianwei Pavilion is Chen Jingying, and I will leave completely. Ye Tian said.

"Pavilion Master, why are you leaving?"

The crowd was shocked.

"If I don't leave, Tianwei Pavilion will be in trouble, even if I guess it in the future, don't ask. I will leave you with enough legacy, and there will be no problem in giving birth to an Ultimate Champion in the future. "

Subsequently.

Ye Tian left behind many inheritances and treasures.

Next, he had to do a big thing, and that was to rob the Twelve Heavenly Sect.

Robbing the Twelve Heavens Sect, it is more difficult to bring back the treasures.

But Ye Tian had a way to take it away.

......

Upper domain.

Terran.

Ye Tian's copy body in the Void Heaven Sect was still asleep, but the other copy bodies were no longer asleep and woke up one by one.

And these copied bodies have now mastered the Tianwei Killing Move and the Heavenly Extreme Killing Move, and at this moment, he understands that mastering these two ultimate dimensional killing moves can also fuse the rules of the highest dimension, so that these two ultimate dimensional killing moves can burst out with unprecedented combat power.

After mastering the two ultimate dimensional killing moves, his copy body began to transform, gradually transforming into the ultimate body, which was not to become the ultimate realm master, but similar to the ultimate master.

Of course, he still needs to enter the Dimensional Sea now, rush to the vicinity of the Divine Dimension Heaven and Earth through the Dimensional Sea, let Yang Wu's body bring those treasures out, and then he will bring them back to the Multidimensional Territory.

That's his plan.
